mapper.select: SELECT setting_key AS settingKey, setting_value AS settingValue, description, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM system_settings WHERE setting_key = #{key}
SELECT setting_key AS settingKey, setting_value AS settingValue, description, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM system_settings ORDER BY setting_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_settings (setting_key, setting_value, description, updated_at) VALUES (#{settingKey}, #{settingValue}, #{description}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE setting_value = #{settingValue}, updated_at = NOW()
